* * *

The rental market in Miami shows a mean price of $2,500. Median prices reflect stable demand in the area. Standard deviation indicates price variability.

* * *

Condos dominate the market with the highest average price. Single family homes show lower but steady demand. Outliers are rare but present in high-end properties.

* * *

Matplotlib visualizes price trends across property types. Seaborn highlights outliers in the data set. The analysis supports informed investment decisions.
